action.reasoning: Observation: Persistent token/feature mismatch (112 vs 112) despite printed match; train.py/predict.py truncated in workspace (incomplete saves, loop ends abruptly, predict misses full JSON write); test_prep OK showing bbox+point data. Analysis: Root cause is template not inserting exact matching # of vision pads vs computed features from image_grid_thw (standard Qwen2VL issue with dynamic res + apply_chat_template without explicit vision_string); pixel_values shape [448,1176] confirms flattened patches but internal get_placeholder_mask fails on count. Manual vision_string construction with num_tokens = (h*w//4) from grid guarantees exact match. Resize not needed. Complete non-truncated compact scripts, use exact prompt_len from tokenized prompt_text for masking, save all files (adapter/processor/grid), scale to 64 samples/32 steps. Predict fully rewritten with all parsers/rescale/clip/default/JSON. This follows Qwen2VL SFT pattern for grounding and will yield first successful run + baseline score. Decision: Overwrite train.py and predict.py with fixed complete versions, run test_prep+train, submit_eval for first grounding_score + time before scaling data/epochs/LR.
